name: ollama-translate
title: Ollama Translate
description: Translate text using local language models - privacy-focused translation powered by AI
author: AdityaRahmad

commands.name: translate
commands.title: Translate
commands.subtitle: Interactive translation
commands.description: Translate text with full UI - select languages, models, and view results

commands.name: instant-copy
commands.title: Instant Copy
commands.subtitle: Translate clipboard → copy
commands.description: Translate clipboard text and copy result automatically

commands.name: instant-paste
commands.title: Instant Paste
commands.subtitle: Translate clipboard → paste
commands.description: Translate clipboard text and paste to active app

preferences.name: ollamaHost
preferences.title: Ollama Host
preferences.description: The URL of your Ollama server

preferences.name: defaultModel
preferences.title: Default Model
preferences.description: Default Ollama model to use for translation

preferences.name: defaultTargetLang
preferences.title: Default Target Language
preferences.description: Default target language code (e.g., id, en, es)
